title: WEAPONIZED Visual Identity Test — Corrected Production Release
summary: Introduced GreyAlien’s first live podcast visual identity banner on the WEAPONIZED series page. The production design uses verified show and host names with an original, non-portrait editorial graphic, responsive desktop/mobile presentation, accessible alternative text, and an official-site attribution link. No synthetic host likenesses are used.
phase: Presentation track — factual visual identity prototype
